angle: Unlock your iPhone's secret dark mode toggle for battery savings.
hook: Want to save battery on your iPhone? This hidden dark mode trick is gold!
script: Want to save battery on your iPhone? This hidden dark mode trick is gold! If you didn’t know, enabling dark mode can actually reduce battery usage a lot, especially on OLED screens. Just go to Settings, tap Display & Brightness, then toggle to dark mode. In our testing, it can extend your battery life by hours! Try it out and see the difference. Follow for more!
caption_body: Did you know your iPhone has a hidden dark mode? It could save you battery life! 🌙
full_caption: Did you know your iPhone has a hidden dark mode? It could save you battery life! 🌙 #tech #gadgetreview #iphonedarkmode #batteryhacks #techhacks
